Notes: Season opener for both teams, with UWO playing its first contest since March 7
and UWP Feb. 22...UWP got 18 points and 13 rebounds from Domask and 15 points
and 5 rebounds from Gilbert...UWO got 16 points from Porath and a career-high
11 from Jorgensen...UWP posted a 44-27 rebounding advantage.
Game.Officials: Ron Quirk,  Michael Steidl,  Darla Brendenmuehl
